books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: A book about building better habits and making tiny changes that lead to remarkable results.

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: A story of the fabulously wealthy Jay Gatsby and his love for the beautiful Daisy Buchanan.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship for writing readable and maintainable code.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.author: Harper Lee
books.description: A gripping tale of racial injustice and loss of innocence in the American South.

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Andrew Hunt
books.description: Timeless advice on software development from journeyman to master.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A young shepherd travels from Spain to Egypt in search of treasure and discovers the meaning of life.

books.title: Deep Work
books.author: Cal Newport
books.description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world — why deep work is valuable, rare, and meaningful.

books.title: Ikigai
books.author: Héctor García
books.description: A Japanese concept exploring the secrets to a long, happy, and purposeful life.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A chilling vision of a totalitarian future where Big Brother watches every move and truth is whatever the party says.

books.title: Sapiens
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: A brief history of humankind — how Homo sapiens came to dominate the planet and what that means for our future.

books.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.description: A landmark work exploring the two systems of thought that drive the way we make decisions.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.description: An epic tale of politics, religion, and survival on the desert planet Arrakis, home to the most valuable substance in the universe.

books.title: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
books.author: Stephen Covey
books.description: Powerful lessons in personal change that have transformed the lives of millions of readers worldwide.

books.title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
books.author: Robert T. Kiyosaki
books.description: What the rich teach their kids about money that the poor and middle class do not.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: A young boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his journey at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

books.title: The Lean Startup
books.author: Eric Ries
books.description: How today's entrepreneurs use continuous innovation to create radically successful businesses.

books.title: Educated
books.author: Tara Westover
books.description: A memoir about a young woman who, kept out of school, leaves her survivalist family and earns a PhD from Cambridge University.

books.title: The Psychology of Money
books.author: Morgan Housel
books.description: Timeless lessons on wealth, greed, and happiness — why smart people make irrational financial decisions.

books.title: Becoming
books.author: Michelle Obama
books.description: An intimate and powerful memoir by the former First Lady of the United States.

books.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
books.author: Douglas Adams
books.description: Seconds before Earth is demolished to make way for a hyperspace bypass, Arthur Dent is whisked off the planet by his alien friend Ford Prefect.
